name: reaudit
description: AI Search Visibility Platform — Track, optimize, and amplify your brand presence across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and 7 more AI engines. 149 tools: visibility scoring, prompt tracking, GEO content generation, paid intelligence with multi-platform ad campaigns, CRO with funnel analysis and A/B testing, revenue attribution, Reddit lead monitoring, Bing Webmaster, and interactive MCP App visualizations.
